description: In this episode of the Hive Mind podcast, host Jose Macedou discusses on-chain liquidity with experts from Delphi, including Ceteris, Jan Lieberman, Duncan (Flood Capital), and Matt (Oxdefi). They explore the evolution of on-chain liquidity from Ether Delta to AMMs like Uniswap and Curve, analyzing the challenges and innovations in the space.
topic_summary: The discussion covers the history and future of on-chain liquidity, starting from Ether Delta's inefficiencies [t=0:24] to the rise of AMMs that address gas constraints [t=189:86]. The experts share insights on liquidity provision and the impact of farming rewards on user participation [t=265:55].
